scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix apps/api" "npm run dev --prefix apps/web"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix apps/api && npm install --prefix apps/web
scripts.test: concurrently --names "API,WEB" "npm run test --prefix apps/api" "npm run test --prefix apps/web"
scripts.test:coverage: concurrently --names "API,WEB" "npm run test:coverage --prefix apps/api" "npm run test:coverage --prefix apps/web"
